---
title: "Data Science & AI Portfolio"
subtitle: "Data Engineering, LLMs, Agentic Systems, MCPs, and RAG."
about:
  template: jolla
  image: ./images/profile.png
---

I am **Ángel Alberto Merino Cedeño**, a Master's student in Data Science specializing in the development of Generative AI Systems, RAG Chatbots, and Data Architectures.

Here you will find detailed technical documentation on my most recent implementations.

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;"}
[View Projects &rarr;](./proyectos.html){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}
[About Me &rarr;](./about.html){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
